# WakaWiki

A CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase. Uses LLMs to explore source code, read files, search patterns, and generate structured Markdown docs.

## Docs

- [What is WakaWiki?](https://wakawiki.dev/guide/getting-started): Overview and how it works
- [Installation](https://wakawiki.dev/guide/installation): Cargo, npm, or build from source
- [Commands](https://wakawiki.dev/guide/usage): CLI reference including --scan, --update, -p, --version
- [Providers](https://wakawiki.dev/guide/providers): OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, opencode
- [Configuration](https://wakawiki.dev/guide/configuration): Settings via ~/.wakawiki/.env
- [GitHub Actions](https://wakawiki.dev/guide/ci): CI workflow for auto-updating docs

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/sonyarianto/wakawiki): Source code and releases
